expected_score_rule: Contract-test expected values are explicit in this artifact; generated tests MUST NOT infer missing score/band/risk behavior from prose.

preconditions: ensure target paths are absent before invocation
make <tmp>/quality.json an unsafe directory or symlink before invocation

deterministic_generation.recipe: Pre-create an unsafe --quality-output path while --output path is writable. The CLI must preflight both and write neither.

required_assertions: neither output file is created or modified
